pages.text: $(l)Petal Storm$() unleashes a storm of razor-sharp petals that slice through all enemies in an area.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 5$(br)$(l)Type:$() AoE Attack$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 25,000 + 12,000/level$(br2)Hits multiple targets in a radius around you with knockback. The petal projectiles can be enhanced by Bore Lens (pierce) and Velocity Lens (speed + range) catalysts.
